title: HIT 3
synopsis: The third installment of the HIT series follows a brilliant cop solving a complex serial murder case.

title: Kalki 2898 AD
synopsis: In a dystopian future, a cop hunts a wanted rebel in a land ravaged by drought and war.

title: Eega
synopsis: A reincarnated fly seeks revenge on the man who murdered him and stole his love.

title: Salaar: Part 1 – Ceasefire
synopsis: A mysterious man enters a violent world to fulfill a promise to his dying friend.

title: Sita Ramam
synopsis: A soldier embarks on a mission to deliver a letter from a prince to his love, bridging a gap of 20 years.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
synopsis: The epic conclusion to the saga of Mahishmati as Mahendra Baahubali claims his rightful throne.

title: Liger
synopsis: A street fighter from Mumbai rises to become a national champion with the help of his mother.

title: RRR
synopsis: Two legendary revolutionaries join forces to fight against the British Raj in colonial India.

title: Kuberaa
synopsis: A common man seeks revenge against a powerful gangster who ruined his family.

title: Avengers: Endgame
synopsis: The remaining Avengers must reverse Thanos's snap and restore balance to the universe.

title: Inception
synopsis: A thief who steals information by entering people's dreams is offered a chance to have his criminal history erased if he can plant an idea into a CEO's subconscious.

title: Athadu
synopsis: A wanted assassin assumes a new identity to escape his past, only to find himself entangled in a web of family drama.

title: Chhaava

title: Coolie
synopsis: A wronged man seeks revenge on the corrupt officials who framed him and destroyed his life.
